breaches.title: Klue OAuth breach victim list grows as Icarus hackers claim attack
breaches.tldr: Market intelligence platform Klue has publicly confirmed a recent security incident that allowed threat actors to steal OAuth tokens used to connect to customers' Salesforce environments, as the new "Icarus" extortion group publicly claims the attack. [...]
breaches.action: Verify system logs for indicators of compromise and apply relevant patches.

breaches.title: Texas govt data breach exposes over 3 million driver’s licenses
breaches.tldr: The Texas Parks and Wildlife Department (TPWD) disclosed a data breach at its license system vendor that exposed personal information for more than three million individuals. [...]
